title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the role of AI in coding. Topics include flash sale infrastructure, engineering principles, database architecture trends, and hiring top engineers in the AI era.
